title: Review session store + candidates ledger: lib/reviews.mjs + bee_reviews.mjs (create/list/show/record/candidate)
action: Build the review-session store and candidates ledger per SPEC §8 and R4/R5/R10 (per 565e68d0). New lib/reviews.mjs mirroring the cells.mjs pattern: one session per file at .bee/reviews/<id>.json with fields id, requested_by, requested_at, scope_description, included (features/cells/commits), excluded (entries carry a reason), baseline, head, reviewer_manifest, verification_preflight, findings, uat, decision (pending|blocked|approved + gate4 record), created_at/updated_at. New bee_reviews.mjs CLI (per bb4bb18e every mutation is a verb, strict reads on write paths, no hand-edits): `create --file <scope.json>` freezes scope — it runs the verification preflight over every included behavior_change cell (recorded verification_evidence present per cell trace) and FAILS CLOSED with non-zero exit and ZERO files written when evidence is missing (A10); included cells in status open/claimed are AUTO-EXCLUDED with reason 'in progress' (A6), never silently included; `list`, `show --id`; `record --id --kind manifest|preflight|finding|uat|decision --file <json>` appends/sets sub-records and REFUSES any change to baseline/head/included/excluded after create (R5 immutability, non-zero exit, file untouched); `candidate add --feature F --head <sha> --mode <mode> [--baseline <sha>] [--cells a,b]` appends one line to append-only .bee/review-candidates.jsonl — `--mode` is REQUIRED and records the closing feature's lane (docs|tiny|small|spike|standard|high-risk) on the entry; review-od-3's R7 high-risk warning reads exactly this field; `candidates` lists raw entries. Scope.json input contract for `create`: it carries id, requested_by, scope_description, included, excluded (optional pre-exclusions), baseline, head — create echoes these fields verbatim into the session file (SPEC §8 is the stored schema) and REFUSES with non-zero exit when .bee/reviews/<id>.json already exists (id non-reuse, §8: 'Định danh ổn định, không tái sử dụng'). Copy both new files byte-identical into .bee/bin/. Add test_lib.mjs coverage: session create/show roundtrip; immutability refusal (record attempting baseline change exits non-zero, file byte-unchanged); preflight fail-closed red-first (behavior_change cell without evidence -> non-zero, .bee/reviews empty); A6 auto-exclusion (claimed cell lands in excluded with reason 'in progress'); candidate append + list roundtrip; corrupt session JSON read fails open on list (skip+warn) but write verbs fail closed (readStateStrict pattern). Derived candidate STATUS and git coverage are review-od-2's scope — do NOT implement them here.

truths: create with a behavior_change included cell lacking verification_evidence exits non-zero and writes no session file
an included cell with status open or claimed is moved to excluded with reason 'in progress', never reviewed-in
record can never change baseline, head, included, or excluded after create — refusal exits non-zero and leaves the session file byte-identical
candidate add appends exactly one JSONL line carrying feature, head, and mode (the closing feature's lane), and never rewrites prior lines
create refuses an already-existing session id with non-zero exit and no file change (id non-reuse)
every mutation path goes through a CLI verb with a strict read — a corrupt session/ledger file makes write verbs exit non-zero without clobbering

artifacts.substantive: session read/write/list, scope freeze + immutability enforcement, preflight over cell traces, candidates ledger append/read
CLI verbs create/list/show/record/candidate add/candidates with strict-read write paths and fail-closed refusals
red-first checks for preflight fail-closed, immutability refusal, A6 auto-exclusion, ledger append, corrupt-file behavior

key_links: SPEC §8 field table is the session schema contract
.bee/bin/lib/reviews.mjs and .bee/bin/bee_reviews.mjs stay byte-identical to templates (existing parity sweep must pass)
prohibitions: Do not modify lib/state.mjs (phase enum stays untouched — SPEC §11.4)
Do not touch any SKILL.md, reference, AGENTS block, or docs prose (slice 2)
Do not weaken or delete any existing test assertion (frozen-judge; a blocking frozen assertion -> return [BLOCKED] quoting it)
Do not implement derived candidate status or git range coverage (review-od-2)

trace.outcome: Built the review-session store + candidates ledger: lib/reviews.mjs (create/list/show/record + A6 auto-exclusion + A10 fail-closed preflight + R5 immutability) and bee_reviews.mjs CLI (create/list/show/record/candidate add/candidates), both vendored byte-identical into .bee/bin/; 17 new test_lib.mjs checks cover session roundtrip, A6, A10, id non-reuse, immutability refusal, corrupt-file strict-read-vs-fail-open split, and the candidates ledger append contract.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs (existing cells.mjs/decisions.mjs/reservations.mjs sections, reused as the pattern to mirror for a new one-file-per-entity store + append-only ledger)"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "createReview: session roundtrip carries every SPEC §8 field, and show/readReview round-trips it",
    "createReview: A10 fails closed — a behavior_change cell with no verification_evidence refuses create and writes NO session file",
    "createReview: A6 auto-excludes an open/claimed included cell with reason \"in progress\", never silently reviewed-in",
    "createReview: a pre-declared \"excluded\" entry in the scope input is preserved alongside auto-exclusions",
    "createReview: refuses an already-existing session id with non-zero-equivalent throw and leaves the file byte-unchanged (id non-reuse, §8)",
    "createReview: rejects missing required scope fields and an empty \"included\" array before any write",
    "recordOnReview: refuses any payload touching baseline/head/included/excluded — exits via throw, file byte-unchanged (R5 immutability)",
    "recordOnReview: manifest/preflight/decision SET the field; finding/uat APPEND one entry per call",
    "recordOnReview: rejects an unknown kind before touching the file",
    "reviews: strict read fails loud on a corrupt session (write verbs fail closed) — readReview/list stay fail-open",
    "recordOnReview: refuses a session id that does not exist (nothing to mutate)",
    "candidate ledger: addCandidate requires --mode from the closing feature's lane, appends exactly one JSONL line, never rewrites prior lines",
    "candidate ledger: a corrupt line is skipped on read (fail-open), good lines still returned",
    "bee_reviews.mjs create/show/list/record/candidate round-trip through the CLI, --file and --stdin both work",
    "bee_reviews.mjs create exits non-zero and writes nothing when the A10 preflight fails",
    "bee_reviews.mjs candidate add requires --mode and rejects an unrecognized mode, leaving the ledger untouched",
    "bee_reviews.mjs with no command prints a Use: line listing all verbs and exits non-zero"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this cell, skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/reviews.mjs and bee_reviews.mjs did not exist in the repo (git status showed a clean tree with no such files prior to this session's writes). Every test above imports from '../lib/reviews.mjs' and spawns '../bee_reviews.mjs' — running the suite against the pre-cell tree would fail at import time (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND) before a single assertion ran, and the A6/A10/R5 behaviors it proves (auto-exclusion, fail-closed preflight, scope immutability) had no prior implementation anywhere in the repo to characterize as 'old behavior' — this is new API surface, not a change to an existing one.",
  "verification_run": "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs -> 188 passed, 0 failed (full suite, including the pre-existing vendored-parity sweep confirming .bee/bin/{bee_reviews.mjs,lib/reviews.mjs} are byte-identical to the templates)",
  "deliberate_exceptions": [
    "Brand-new module (lib/reviews.mjs + bee_reviews.mjs) — there is no prior version of this store/CLI to diff against; red_failure_evidence above documents that the tests fail at import time on the pre-cell tree instead."
  ]
}
